title: Paraeremostachys ammophila
taxonomy: Paraeremostachys ammophila is classified within the family of plants known as Plumbaginaceae. This family is a part of the order Plumbaginales. The order is further grouped under the class Magnoliopsida, which is a subgroup of flowering plants. The class Magnoliopsida is part of the division Magnoliophyta, which is one of the main divisions of flowering plants. Overall, this classification reflects the plant's evolutionary relationships and its position within the broader plant kingdom.
